pre_game.message: Hey, I'm F — nice to meet you. I figured I'd say hello before the game starts; what brought you here and what are you hoping to do in the game?
Hey F — I'm here for the prize; I want to win money to help my family and friends, so I'll play smart, read people, and try to bring home as much as I can.
Same — I'm here to win for my people. Good to meet you. Let's keep an eye on each other and share info when it helps, but I'll be playing smart too.
Agreed — let's watch each other's moves and share useful reads, but stay cautious and don't trust blindly.
Sounds good — I'll do the same; let's swap reads after each round and call out anyone acting sketchy.
Deal — after each round we'll swap reads and call out anyone sketchy. Let's stay sharp and adapt.
Sounds good — I'll be honest with my reads and expect yours; let's watch for people who play too quiet or too eager. Good luck.
Thanks — I’ll be straight with my reads; let’s watch the quiet/eager players and win this.
Agreed — straight reads, watch the quiet/eager players, swap after rounds. Let’s win this.
Sounds good — I’m with you; let’s trade honest reads after each round and stay sharp. Good luck.
Sounds good — I'll be honest with my reads; let's compare notes after round one and adapt. Good luck.
Sounds good — I’ll compare notes after round one and adapt. Good luck.
Sounds good — I’ll compare notes after round one and share my reads; keep me posted.
Got it — I’ll share my reads after round one; keep me posted too and we’ll call out anyone acting off. Good luck.
Sounds good — I’ll meet you by the door after round one with my reads; if anyone’s acting too quiet or eager we’ll call them out. Good luck.
Sounds good — I’ll meet you by the door after round one; let’s compare reads and call out anyone acting off. Good luck.
Sounds good—I'll meet you by the door after round one; we'll compare reads and call out anyone acting off. Good luck.
Perfect — see you by the door after round one; I’ll be on time, honest with reads, and ready to call out anyone acting off.
